narrative:
Pedro Porrero is a Right-Back representing Spain. His overall rating stands at 7.21/10. This places him among the top 7% of right-backs at this tournament.

His attacking output at this World Cup is evident with 0.333 goals per 90 minutes and 1.333 shots per 90 minutes. He also contributes defensively with 2.667 tackles and 1.333 interceptions per 90 minutes. Despite 2.667 key passes per 90 minutes, his expected assists at this World Cup are 0.064 per 90 minutes, which is lower than his club xA of 0.16.

Pedro Porrero is clearly a crucial two-way player for his national team. His World Cup goals per 90 minutes are significantly higher than his club average. Scouts should watch for his continued attacking drive and how his 2.667 key passes per 90 minutes translate into higher assist numbers.
